PROFILE.OTP_REQUIRED_HINT: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm the password change.

USERS.TITLE: User management
USERS.SUBTITLE: Manage system users
USERS.NAME: Name
USERS.OTP_REQUIRED_HELP: By default the user must enter a 6-digit OTP on every sign-in and password change.
USERS.ACTIVE_HELP: When disabled, the user is blocked from accessing the platform until reactivated.
USERS.CONFIRM_SAVE_MESSAGE: The changes will be applied to the user account immediately.

LOGIN.TAGLINE_SUB: A modern platform for tracking and resolving cases.
LOGIN.TITLE: Sign in
LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Enter your credentials to access
LOGIN.OTP_SUBTITLE: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
LOGIN.OTP_HELP: For security, this sign-in requires your second factor before entering the system.
LOGIN.OTP_SETUP_HELP: An administrator enabled OTP for your account. Scan the QR or register the manual key and then enter your first 6-digit code.
LOGIN.OTP_SCAN_HINT: Scan this code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or any compatible app.
LOGIN.RECOVERY_SENT: We sent a password reset link to the provided email address.
LOGIN.RECOVERY_EMAIL_REQUIRED: Enter a valid email so we can send the recovery link.
LOGIN.ERROR_INVALID_OTP: The OTP code is invalid. Check the 6 digits and try again.
LOGIN.ERROR_OTP_SETUP_REQUIRED: Your account must finish OTP setup before you can sign in. Use the activation or recovery link.
LOGIN.ERROR_NETWORK: Could not connect to the server. Check your connection.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Set your password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Create a secure password for your account
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_SETUP_HINT: Register this account in your authenticator app and enter the first 6-digit OTP code to confirm enrollment.
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_VERIFY_HINT: To reset your password you must confirm your 6-digit OTP code.
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_KEY: Manual key for the authenticator app
RESET_PASSWORD.REDIRECT: You will be redirected to login in a few seconds...
RESET_PASSWORD.INVALID_LINK: The link is invalid or has expired.
RESET_PASSWORD.ERROR: An error occurred. Please request a new link.
RESET_PASSWORD.OTP_ERROR: We could not validate the OTP. Check your authenticator app and try again.

LEADS.TITLE: Leads
LEADS.SUBTITLE: Prospects from Google Sheets
LEADS.MANUAL_SUBTITLE: Manual records created by the team
LEADS.STEP1_INCOMPLETE: Complete all form fields to continue
LEADS.MARITAL_STATUS: What is your marital status? (even in another country)
LEADS.ENTERED_MULTIPLE: Have you entered the USA more than once?
LEADS.ARRESTED: Have you ever been arrested, detained, fined or received a ticket in the USA?
LEADS.MARRIED_US_CITIZEN: Have you ever been married to a US citizen or permanent resident?
LEADS.CHILDREN_US_STATUS: Do you have children or stepchildren who are US citizens, residents or hold a US government permit?
LEADS.MIGRATION_STATUS: What is your current migration status?
LEADS.HISTORY_PLACEHOLDER: Write any relevant information about this lead...
LEADS.SYNC_ERROR: Could not sync. Please try again.
LEADS.INTAKE_SAVE_ERROR: Error saving the intake. Please try again.
LEADS.VALIDATION_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
LEADS.UNSAVED_CHANGES_WARNING: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
LEADS.CONVERTED_READONLY: This lead has already been converted to a case. The intake is read-only.
LEADS.SOURCE_REMOVED_HINT: This record no longer exists in the original sheet, but it has been preserved locally with its history.
LEADS.NEW_LEAD_SUBTITLE: Create a lead manually without going through Google Sheets
LEADS.ASSIGN_REQUIRED_TO_EDIT: You must assign a responsible user before updating this intake.
LEADS.ONLY_ASSIGNED_CAN_EDIT: Only the assigned user can update this intake information.
LEADS.ASSIGNEE_UPDATE_ERROR: Could not update the assignee. Please try again.
LEADS.CREATE_ERROR: Failed to create lead. Please try again.
LEADS.STEP_2_SUBTITLE: Define the services and installment plan for this client.
LEADS.SERVICES_HINT: Type a service name and press Enter or click Add.
LEADS.PAYMENT_PLAN_SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the payment plan.
LEADS.READY_TO_CONVERT: Payment plan is saved. You can now preview and confirm the conversion.
LEADS.CONVERT_CONFIRM: Confirm conversion of this lead to a legal case? This action cannot be undone.
LEADS.CONVERT_OK: Lead successfully converted to a case.
LEADS.CONVERT_ERROR: Could not convert the lead. Ensure it has a complete intake and payment plan.
LEADS.COMPLETED_SUBTITLE: Leads that have completed the intake and conversion process.
